unitName: 說服父母領養寵物（部落格） | A blog entry (Asking parents to adopt a pet)

article.title: A blog entry (Asking parents to adopt a pet) 說服父母領養寵物（部落格）

paragraphs.english: My parents don't like animals. But I've always wanted a pet because I feel lonely at home as the only child.
sentences: But I've always wanted a pet because I feel lonely at home as the only child.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我的父母不喜歡動物。但我一直想要一個寵物，因為作為獨生子，我在家感到孤單。
translation_sentences: 但我一直想要一個寵物，因為作為獨生子，我在家感到孤單。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger introduces the conflict: parents don't like animals, but the child feels lonely and wants a pet.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客介紹了衝突：父母不喜歡動物，但孩子感到孤單想要寵物。[換句話說]：我爸媽不喜歡動物，但我自己是獨生子，在家很無聊，一直很想養寵物。

paragraphs.english: After reading an article about a therapy dog and how it helped teens like me feel happier, I decided to talk to my parents about adopting a dog!
sentences: After reading an article about a therapy dog and how it helped teens like me feel happier,
I decided to talk to my parents about adopting a dog!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 在讀了一篇關於治療犬的文章，了解牠如何幫助像我這樣的青少年更快樂之後，我決定和父母談談領養一隻狗的事！
translation_sentences: 🌐 在讀了一篇關於治療犬的文章，了解牠如何幫助像我這樣的青少年更快樂之後，
我決定和父母談談領養一隻狗的事！

implication.english: 💡 The article about therapy dogs inspires the blogger to talk to parents about adoption.
implication.chinese: 💡 關於治療犬的文章啟發了部落客與父母談論領養的事。[換句話說]：我看到一篇報導說治療犬可以讓青少年更快樂，就決定用這個理由說服爸媽。

paragraphs.english: I showed them the article. They agreed that the dog was a good solution to help students at school. However, they said not all dogs are calm and relaxed. Some dogs may bark or bite you if you try to interact with them.
sentences: They agreed that the dog was a good solution to help students at school.
However, they said not all dogs are calm and relaxed.
Some dogs may bark or bite you if you try to interact with them.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我把文章給他們看。他們同意狗是幫助學生的好方法。但是，他們說不是所有的狗都冷靜放鬆。有些狗可能會對你吠叫或咬你，如果你試圖和牠們互動的話。
translation_sentences: 他們同意狗是幫助學生的好方法。
但是，他們說不是所有的狗都冷靜放鬆。
有些狗可能會對你吠叫或咬你，如果你試圖和牠們互動的話。

implication.english: 💡 Parents acknowledge the benefits but express concerns about dogs' unpredictable behavior.
implication.chinese: 💡 父母承認好處，但表達對狗不可預測行為的擔憂。[換句話說]：爸媽看了文章也覺得狗對學生有幫助，但他們擔心不是每隻狗都溫馴，可能會咬人。

paragraphs.english: I wasn't going to give up so easily. So, I showed them more articles about how dogs provided emotional support to their owners. I told them how lonely I felt when they were busy at work.
sentences: I wasn't going to give up so easily.
So, I showed them more articles about how dogs provided emotional support to their owners.
I told them how lonely I felt when they were busy at work.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我不打算這麼輕易放棄。所以，我給他們看更多關於狗如何為主人提供情感支持的文章。我告訴他們，當他們忙於工作時，我感到多麼孤單。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我不打算這麼輕易放棄。
所以，我給他們看更多關於狗如何為主人提供情感支持的文章。
我告訴他們，當他們忙於工作時，我感到多麼孤單。

implication.english: 💡 The blogger persists, using more evidence and appealing to parents' emotions about the child's loneliness.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客堅持不懈，用更多證據和情感訴求來打動父母。[換句話說]：我沒那麼容易放棄，又找了很多文章給他們看，還說他們都不在家我很孤單。

paragraphs.english: They finally promised to visit an animal shelter with me this weekend! Wish me luck!
sentences: They finally promised to visit an animal shelter with me this weekend!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 他們終於答應這週末和我一起去動物收容所！祝我好運吧！
translation_sentences: 🌐 他們終於答應這週末和我一起去動物收容所！

implication.english: 💡 The blogger succeeds in persuading parents to visit a shelter, ending on a hopeful note.
implication.chinese: 💡 部落客成功說服父母去收容所，以充滿希望的語句結束。[換句話說]：爸媽終於答應這週末帶我去收容所了，希望可以領養成功！
